content:
---
title: "Description"
---

# fix(app): invert mermaid wheel zoom direction

## Summary
Invert mouse-wheel zoom behavior in the Mermaid diagram viewer so wheel interactions zoom in the intended direction.

## Key changes
- Updated `DiagramViewer` to pass `wheel={{ step: -0.1 }}` to `TransformWrapper` (was `0.1`).
- Kept all other zoom/pan bounds and initialization behavior unchanged (`initialScale`, `minScale`, `maxScale`, `centerOnInit`).

## Diagram

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  subgraph ui["Mermaid Diagram UI"]
    direction TB
    diagram_viewer["DiagramViewer (updated)"]:::updated
    controls["Controls (unchanged)"]:::unchanged
  end

  subgraph zoomlib["Zoom/Pan Runtime"]
    direction TB
    transform_wrapper["TransformWrapper wheel.step = -0.1 (updated)"]:::updated
    transform_component["TransformComponent (unchanged)"]:::unchanged
  end

  diagram_viewer -- "configures zoom behavior" --> transform_wrapper
  diagram_viewer -- "renders" --> controls
  transform_wrapper -- "hosts" --> transform_component
  controls -- "controls zoom/pan on" --> transform_wrapper

  classDef unchanged stroke:#626D84,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef added stroke:#29A34A,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef updated stroke:#6B5FCE,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef removed stroke:#D92424,stroke-width:2px,fill:transparent,color:#1B2236,rx:8,ry:8
  classDef subgraphStyle fill:transparent,stroke:#C0C5CF,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:5 5,rx:8,ry:8
  class ui,zoomlib subgraphStyle
```
